note: Self-improving loop: improve multicolor pipeline for 20-30 color images; target hw_forest_cat quality.

iter_9_probes.result: regresses; sal=1 is the sweet spot
more restarts hurt under saliency init — exploring worse starts
borderline — max improved (0.641 vs 0.653), palette +0.2pp, but median over threshold. Reverted.

observations: Re-testing previously-rejected probes under the new best config (mt=4, sal=1) confirmed sal=1 is a local optimum. Higher saliency overshoots; more restarts hurt with salency init; extra denoise passes are borderline.

denoisePasses=3 is ambiguous: median slightly worse (+2.7%) but max meaningfully better (-1.8%) and paletteMatch +0.2pp. If the primary concern were worst-case loss rather than median, this would be kept.

Parameter space is well-explored. Remaining untried: mergeThreshold=10, minClusterFraction=0.001, autoKStrategy=silhouette at new config, restarts=12 at new config. All unlikely to yield on past patterns.
Next productive direction: re-examine the iter-2 denoiseRadius=2 result under mt=4+sal=1. That was rejected at mt=8 but order-dependency keeps surprising.
